parts.text: Analyze return fraud for data/sample_returns.csv and summarize the risk level for Rajesh Kumar (C004).
Rajesh Kumar (C004) has a risk score of 70/100 and is classified as HIGH_RISK due to serial_returner, identity_ring, and policy_exploit signals.
Analyze return fraud for data/sample_returns.csv and summarize the risk level for Vikram Singh (C007).
Vikram Singh (C007) has a risk score of 35/100 and is classified as LOW_RISK but triggered the swap_fraud signal due to item weight discrepancy.
Analyze return fraud for data/sample_returns.csv and summarize the risk level for Aarav Sharma (C001).
Aarav Sharma (C001) has a risk score of 0/100 and is classified as LOW_RISK.
Analyze return fraud for data/sample_returns.csv and confirm if customer names are masked in the output table.
Yes, customer names are masked as [MASKED] in the output table and audit trails to preserve privacy.
Scrutinize review R-1 for product PROD-001 (Athletic Knit Running Shoes). The review text is 'great product nice item buy love perfect' and rating is 5. What is the fake score?
The review has a fake score of 60 or above due to generic praise and suspiciously short signals.
Analyze review network signals for a list of 6 reviews all posted on the same day. What signal is triggered?
The temporal_burst signal is triggered because 5 or more reviews were posted within a 24-hour window.
Audit the review R-1 for product PROD-002 (Premium Waterproof Sneaker Spray). The text is a 35-word detailed verified purchase. What is the fake score?
The detailed verified purchase review is marked as genuine and has a fake score of 30 or less.
Scan a review with text 'love this great excellent shoes' but with a rating of 1. What signal is triggered?
The sentiment_mismatch signal is triggered because of the mismatch between the positive text and 1-star rating.
Audit competitor pricing for PROD-C where seller price is 599 and cheapest competitor is 549. What is the price position and urgency?
The price position is classified as expensive and the urgency is ACT_NOW.
Audit competitor pricing for PROD-B where seller price is 349 and cheapest competitor is 379. What is the strategy?
The strategy is formulated as Premium or Bundle since the seller is the cheapest in the category.
Audit competitor pricing for PROD-A where SportyFit always prices 897 when seller prices 899. What is undercutting status?
Undercutting is detected as True from competitor SportyFit.
